metadata.title: Appearance, Stipulations, and Waivers
metadata.author: Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann
metadata.copyright: © 2024–2026 Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann. All Rights Reserved.

fields.guidance_en: Enter the case number assigned when the Petition was filed.
fields.guidance_es: Ingrese el número de caso asignado cuando se presentó la Petición.
fields.guidance_zh: 输入提交请愿书时分配的案件编号。

options: Agrees case may proceed without further notice
fields.guidance_en: Respondent agrees to participate in the case. A general appearance waives defects in service of process.
fields.guidance_es: El demandado acepta participar en el caso. Una comparecencia general renuncia a los defectos en la notificación.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告同意参与案件。一般出庭放弃送达程序中的缺陷。

fields.guidance_en: Respondent waives formal service of the Summons. Only check if respondent received actual notice of the petition and voluntarily appears.
fields.guidance_es: El demandado renuncia a la notificación formal de la Citación.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告放弃传票的正式送达。

fields.guidance_en: Both parties agree to have the case heard by a commissioner or temporary judge instead of a judge.
fields.guidance_es: Ambas partes acuerdan que el caso sea escuchado por un comisionado o juez temporal.
fields.guidance_zh: 双方同意由专员或临时法官审理案件。

fields.guidance_en: Parties may waive final declarations of disclosure (FAM §2105). Preliminary disclosures can only be waived by court order showing good cause.
fields.guidance_es: Las partes pueden renunciar a las declaraciones finales de divulgación (FAM §2105).
fields.guidance_zh: 双方可以放弃最终披露声明（FAM §2105）。
